summary: 2026-07-21 22:16:47 PDT — The implementation correctly clamps both return paths and otherwise stays within the approved display-only scope. One regression assertion is weaker than the spec’s exact-identity requirement.

findings.title: Regression test does not assert byte-identical behavior
findings.claim: AC3 requires the non-negative result to remain byte-identical, but `toBeCloseTo(60, 6)` permits small numerical changes. The test could pass despite a regression that changes the existing result within the tolerance.
findings.suggestion: Use an exact assertion, such as `expect(unchanged.totalCost).toBe(60)`, matching the acceptance criterion.
